title: MoreMouseKeybinds
description: Some useful utility/accessibility features that are toggled using keybinds
body: # MoreMouseKeybinds ### What it does? Adds in some useful utility/accessibility features that are toggled using keybinds. ### Features - Simulate holding of attack and use keys - Simulate periodically pressing the attack key - Hold-to-attack - Attack only when cooldown full - Prevent swinging in air - Lightweight and minimally invasive - Configurable periodic attack interval (by default synced with attack cooldown) ### Requirements - Fabric/Quilt/Forge Loader - Fabric API if on Fabric, QSL (QFAPI) on Quilt. Use the latest version available for your MC version. - Architectury API. Use the latest version available for your MC version. - MidnightLib 0.4.4 or up, the mod uses it for the config system. ### Note This mod is NOT intended to be used for cheating of any kind, it's made to improve accessibility and usability. Please ensure the server you are playing on allows you to use it.
